hero.title: Kuikalaku
hero.lead: IATF idi ne tshipatshila tshia kuenza bua site eu ikale mupepele, mupepele bua kubala, muntu udi mua kumubala anu ku biamu, ne ikale umvuangana ne biamu bidi biambuluisha.
support: Bua bantu kufikabu ku Enternete, IATF udi wenza mudimu ne: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Malu adi bantu badi benza mudimu ne biamu bia diambuluishangana bapeta adi kabidi aleja mudibi mua kuenzeka.

header.title: Kufila luapolo lua tshilumbu tshia mushindu wa kupeta mikanda

paragraphs: Wewe mupete bualu kampanda budi bukupangisha bua kubuela mu site eu, utuambile ku Enternete:
Mu miyuki idi mua kukuambuluisha mudi eyi:
items: tshiamu tshiudi wenza natshi mudimu, navigateur anyi tshiamu, bikalabi ne mushinga
report.footnote: Kuena ne bua kufunda luapolo lua bilema to.

header.title: Diyukidilangana ne malu adi atangila bantu bonso

paragraphs: Badi mua kumvuija mu tshikoso malu adi atangila mushindu wa kupeta mikanda mu tshilaminu tshia mikanda tshia bantu bonso bua ikalebu mua kuyilongolola patoke. Badi bumbusha malu a muntu nkayende ne malu adi kaayi ne mushinga kumpala kua kuapatulabu.
Bikala luapolo luebe luikale ne malu a muntu nkayende, umuleje patoke mu mesaje.
Tshiena-bualu etshi ntshienza ku bukole bua kuikala tshipiatshipia ne katshiena tshishintuluka to.
